title: Lanterns Enhanced - Head on Head
body:
# Lanterns Enhanced
> NOW LANTERNS ON WALLS!

## 📝Features
Lanterns Enhanced transforms **Lanterns**, **Torches** and **Chains** with revamped **3D models**, providing them with a fresh appearance. Moreover, it refines the **third-person holding** view for lanterns and torches, offering a more **aesthetically** pleasing and slightly realistic portrayal.

![Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/841080845c75f34f60e0266e375cb7843d685b43.png)

## Mod Support
Do you want a Custom Map (resourcepack, build, datapack, models, etc) or see your favorite mod without particles or translate it? Request **anything** to be added [here](https://discord.com/invite/nW4qUhABw4).
